title: Health services and benefits - Canada.ca
content:
## Health services and benefits
Health care services and benefits that you can access.

## Services and information
How we’re working with our partners to help you get the medications you need

### Canadian Dental Care Plan
A plan to ease financial barriers to accessing oral health care for eligible Canadians

### National strategy for drugs for rare diseases
This will help increase access to effective drugs for rare diseases and make them more affordable for patients across Canada

### Medical assistance in dying
About medical assistance in dying (MAID), the federal legislation, support, how the practice will be monitored
Preparing for your future, making decisions about your care, resources, information for professionals, what we’re doing

### Home, community and long-term care
The federal government is committed to helping people in Canada get better access to the care they need at home and in the community

### Health care services for First Nations and Inuit
Support programs and services, including for residential school survivors and families, Jordan's Principle, non-insured health benefits for prescription drugs, dental and vision care, combatting racism in health care

### Health and well-being for veterans
Supports and services for veterans such as health insurance, long-term care and mental health services

### Canadian Thalidomide Survivors Support Program
Support payments for Canadian thalidomide survivors, eligibility, how to apply
